subject: [PATCH v7 05/20] nfsd: update the fsnotify mark when setting or removing a dir delegation

2026-06-16.patch_summary: This patch updates the fsnotify mark when setting or removing a directory delegation in the NFS server. It adds a new helper function, nfsd_fsnotify_recalc_mask(), which recalculates the fsnotify mask based on the leases present. The function is called when directory delegations are added or removed and ensures that concurrent updates to the lease state do not clobber each other's changes. This patch also introduces a mutex to serialize access to the recalculation of the mark, preventing stale snapshots from being used in the calculation.
